3048050.name: Path to Perdition
3048050.description:
Path to Perdition is a challenging roguelike auto-battler. Assemble and lead a party of adventurers through unforgiving lands. Equip them with items to unlock skills, modify those skills with relics to create unique effects, and combine those effects using tactical positioning to crush your enemies.

Tactical Auto-Battler

Master preparation and unit positioning to defeat monsters in battles that play out automatically.
Watch, learn, plan, and adapt. Build the most devastating synergies tailored to each fight and claim victory!

Party-Based

Recruit a group of Adventurers, each with their own Race, Class, personal backstory, and unique set of Traits. As your adventure progresses, you’ll be able to add new members to the party, unlocking more and more power... if you can keep them alive.

Flexible Builds & Customizable Skills

New skills are unlocked by weapons and armor looted from enemies or bought from merchants. Swap equipment between battles to completely reshape your party’s play-style.

You can also modify skills using special items called Relics. Each skill has three Relic slots, which allow you to experiment with a wide variety of custom effects to create the ultimate combos.

Living Map

Chart your way through the ever-changing ecosystem of the Corrupted Lands and watch it react to your actions, with routes closing, new ones being revealed, and enemies adapting to their environment. Choose your path wisely, as there are multiple possible ends to your journey.

Resource Management

Carefully manage your resources as you navigate through dangerous biomes, encounter strange characters, uncover forgotten secrets, and grab your fair share of loot. You’ll need camp supplies to rest and recover, and gold to trade.

Hardcore Strategy Roguelike

Featuring permadeath and a procedurally generated world, each run is unique and will force you to adjust your strategy to vanquish the twisted forces plaguing this region. But don’t despair. Learn from your failures and try again!

As you hone your skills, you can attempt more difficult challenges, venturing along more treacherous paths toward the darkest corners of the Corrupted Lands, where ancient gods and nameless horrors await you.
3048050.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
